name: Duke Financial Services
description_short: Family-owned tax preparation and financial consulting firm offering personalized tax services, business formation, and financial education to families and small businesses.
description_long:
Duke Financial Services is a husband-and-wife operated tax preparation and financial consulting firm with over 10 years of combined experience. Founded on the principle of helping lower-income communities build generational wealth, the company positions itself as a community-focused alternative to larger tax preparation chains. The founders emphasize personal relationships and integrity as core to their business model.

The company's service offerings center on tax preparation across multiple filing types, including W-2 and self-employed taxes, amended returns, small business returns, and audit support. They provide secure virtual tax preparation options and offer business formation services as an ancillary offering to support small business development. Their stated focus is on making tax filing accessible, fast, and stress-free for clients who may otherwise struggle with complex financial documentation.

Duke Financial Services distinguishes itself primarily through its family-owned structure and explicit mission focus on lower-income communities and generational wealth building. The company emphasizes transparency, care, and educational components beyond transactional tax preparation. They offer multilingual support (English and Spanish) through their client portal, suggesting intentional outreach to diverse communities. Their use of TaxDome, a professional tax software platform, indicates legitimate tax preparation infrastructure.

The company operates as a tax preparation and financial education provider rather than a lender or credit service. The current categorization as 'business-loans' is inaccurate; this is fundamentally a tax preparation firm with educational and business formation advisory components. No loan products, credit services, or emergency financial assistance are offered. Customers should understand this is traditional tax preparation with an educational and community-focused mission, not financial lending or credit repair.
address: 325 North St. Paul Street Suite 3100, Dallas, TX 75201

company_info.headquarters: 325 North St. Paul Street Suite 3100, Dallas, TX 75201

pros: Over 10 years of combined tax and financial consulting experience from husband-and-wife founders
Explicit mission focus on serving lower-income communities with financial education and wealth-building
Multilingual support in English and Spanish through professional client portal
Comprehensive tax services including self-employed, small business, amended returns, and audit support
Virtual tax preparation options offering convenience and accessibility
Business formation services to help small business owners beyond tax preparation
Emphasis on transparency and personalized service through family-owned model
cons: Limited online information about pricing, fee structure, or service costs
No clear service area definition—unclear whether services are local-only or available nationwide
Minimal online reviews or third-party verification of credentials and customer satisfaction available
Website lacks specific information about credentials, certifications, or tax professional qualifications
No details provided about turnaround times, response times, or service level agreements
best_for: Self-employed individuals and small business owners needing tax preparation and business formation guidance
Lower-income families seeking accessible, personalized tax preparation with financial education
Spanish-speaking clients looking for bilingual tax and financial consulting services
Small business owners needing audit support and resolution assistance
diagnosis: Duke Financial Services is best suited for self-employed individuals, small business owners, and lower-income families seeking personalized, community-focused tax preparation with financial education. The main caveat is that this is a tax preparation and financial education firm, not a lending or credit services company—customers seeking loans, credit repair, or emergency cash should look elsewhere.
services: Client portal access via TaxDome platform
